title: Kozhikode, Kerala — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kozhikode, Kerala: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kozhikode is a city in Kerala with a population of 2,000,000. A historic Malabar Coast city where Vasco da Gama first landed, known for its beaches, delicious cuisine, and spice trade heritage.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
